summary: Created a minimal dependency-ordered M2 task DAG covering the Roadmap M2 world/economy/population vertical slice, the M2 acceptance matrix, and both M1 Gate follow-ups without implementing M2 functionality.

tests_run.result: Pre-existing modified coordination files remain: project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json. Pre-existing untracked route remains. New untracked M2 task files are present under project/tasks/active.
Listed foundation and SIM tasks as CLOSED; M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 as REVIEW; 11 downstream M2 tasks as DRAFT.
No output; no dependency-ready task while M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 remains in REVIEW.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for all M2 task files
tests_run.result: Parsed and shape-checked 12 M2 task files; DAG acyclic; dependencies known.

decisions: All downstream M2 implementation and validation tasks remain DRAFT; no implementation task was advanced to READY.

M2 begins with a map source policy task, then a 30 District/10 Settlement fixture with seasonal curves, followed by content guards and the sim-core/content-runtime boot-boundary contract before simulation economy/route implementation.
M1-GATE-FOLLOW-UP-002 is represented as M2-BOOT-BOUNDARY-001 and is required before M2 economy/route tasks.
M1-GATE-FOLLOW-UP-001 is represented as M2-HOST-HASH-CANARY-001 and is required before M2 exit.
M2 exit validation depends on content rejection, boot-boundary, economy/population, route/transport, client map/list, host hash canary, and pressure validation evidence.
risks: Existing coordination-state changes and route file were already present in the worktree and were not modified by this task.

Several future M2 implementation tasks are R3 because they may touch protocol, boot contracts, simulation determinism, UI performance, or Electron host validation; their task acceptance criteria require explicit tests and reviewer routing.
H-001/H-002 are represented as initial M2 validation evidence, not a claim that the full long-term performance target is already proven.
requested_action: Review the M2 DAG for Roadmap/acceptance-matrix completeness, dependency ordering, M1 follow-up coverage, scope discipline, and handoff validity. Accept or request changes.
